context: Source: Video 1: Full USD Scene Workflow from Scratch (12:17). Evolution: charmeleon. MCP tool: synapse_solaris_scene_template. Live validated: T1, T7 PASS (H21.0.631). Constraints: Chain SOP imports sequentially — NEVER merge. This relates to USD layer composition ordering.; Always add an Output node inside SOP Create to ensure name attribute and operations export correctly regardless of display flag.; Name attribute inside SOPs gives geometry identity in the USD hierarchy.
